nodes.title: Video Size
widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 64. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 


Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters.

nodes.title: LoRA
widgets_values:
# Using LoRAs
**Ctrl + B to enable**

For the camera LoRA we recommend setting strength = 1

You can use LTX [Ready to use camera LoRAs](https://huggingface.co/collections/Lightricks/ltx-2)




Use a second LoRa only when the details are important in the LoRa. 

## Training
We have made available a full trainer to help you to train your own LoRA. You can [find it here](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2)

nodes.title: Enhanced Prompt (Positive)
widgets_values: blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noisy, oversharpened, overexposed, underexposed, flat lighting, neon lighting, modern objects, vehicles, technology, urban elements, sci-fi elements, cartoon, anime, 3d render, cgi, photorealistic, plastic materials, game engine look, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fused fingers, duplicate characters, floating objects, text, watermark, logo, daylight, bright colors, cheerful mood, monsters, action pose, clean surfaces, polished stone, unrealistic reflections, low detail textures, smooth gradients, no brush strokes

nodes.title: Enhanced Prompt (Positive)
widgets_values: f4nt4sy,A premium live-action fantasy cinema shot captures a young stablemaster, perhaps 22 years old, with a determined yet gentle expression on his sun-kissed, slightly rugged face, his skin showing natural pores and faint lines, his chestnut hair, wind-tossed but neatly styled, shifting subtly in the breeze. He wears a faded, off-white linen tunic with sleeves rolled to the elbows, revealing muscular forearms scarred lightly from work, and thick, worn leather bracers encircle his wrists, cinched by simple leather thongs. His simple belt holds a small, tarnished steel knife. He is crouched low, his posture attentive and calming, his body angled towards a tawny griffin chick, the size of a large dog, covered in soft, mottled brown-and-gold down. Its oversized, clumsy wings, still soft and not fully feathered, occasionally twitch with nascent power. Its head is large for its body, with bright, curious amber eyes blinking slowly. Its pale yellow beak is slightly open, emitting soft, anxious chirps. The stablemaster slowly extends an open, calloused hand towards the griffin chick, his expression earnest and soothing. A gentle handheld follow shot tracks the stablemaster as he moves to crouch by the griffin, then smoothly arcs around him to reveal the full expanse of their location: a vast, precarious aerie constructed from thick, rough-hewn timber beams, lashed together with heavy, weathered rope, perched on a sheer mountain cliff. Old, rusted iron pulleys are half-visible, embedded in the structure. Thick layers of dry, golden straw cushion the floor. Beyond the wooden structure, vast, ethereal layers of mountain clouds swirl, occasionally parting to reveal jagged, distant peaks. The stone cliff face is streaked with ancient moss and lichen. Golden dawn light streams across the aerie, casting long, dramatic shadows from the timber beams, exquisitely defining the textures of the stablemaster’s skin and hair, the worn leather of his bracers, and the soft down of the griffin chick, illuminating airborne dust motes dancing in the sunbeams. The faint breeze causes strands of the stablemaster's chestnut hair to sway, and the griffin chick’s downy wings flutter almost imperceptibly, while wisps of mountain cloud drift slowly across the vast expanse and fine particles of straw lift and settle. The soft, nervous chirps and tentative wing-flutters of the griffin chick mingle with the gentle, rhythmic creak of the timber aerie in the wind, and a distant, low moan of the wind echoes through the peaks, punctuated by the faint, soft rustle of straw. The stablemaster leans closer, his lips moving naturally as he murmurs, "Easy now, little one, you're safe here," his voice a soft, reassuring rumble, clearly heard amidst the natural sounds.

nodes.title: LTX models used in  this workflow
widgets_values:
## 📦 Required Models & Assets

### 🧠 Diffusion Model
- **ltx-2-19b-distilled-Q6_k.gguf**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/tree/main/diffusion_models)

---

### 🎥 Video & 🔊 Audio VAE
- **LTX2_video_vae_bf16.safetensors**  
- **LTX2_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/tree/main/VAE)

---

### 📝Clip Text / Instruction Model
- **gemma-3-12b-it-qat-q4_0-gguf**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-3-12b-it-qat-q4_0-gguf/tree/main)

---

### 🔤 Clip Text Encoder / Embeddings
- **ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_distill_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/tree/main/text_encoders)

---

### 🔍 Spatial Upscaler
- **ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/tree/main)


```

📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── ltx-2-19b-distilled-Q6_k.gguf
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      ├── ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_distill_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── gemma-3-12b-it-q4_0.gguf
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │      ├── LTX2_video_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── LTX2_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│          └── ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors

```
